title: Care for sows prior, during and after farrowing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Care for sows prior, during and after farrowing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare farrowing environment

pcs.text: Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing tasks.

pcs.text: Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for tasks and conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for tasks and conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for tasks and conditions.

pcs.text: Select, clean and/or disinfect and prepare accommodation for sows according to pig, security and safety requirements and enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, clean and/or disinfect and prepare accommodation for sows according to pig, security and safety requirements and enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, clean and/or disinfect and prepare accommodation for sows according to pig, security and safety requirements and enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Check and/or adjust housing environment and conditions as required to ensure appropriate ventilation, temperature and humidity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and/or adjust housing environment and conditions as required to ensure appropriate ventilation, temperature and humidity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and/or adjust housing environment and conditions as required to ensure appropriate ventilation, temperature and humidity.

pcs.text: Check and/or adjust feeders and drinkers to ensure availability of feed and correct flow rate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and/or adjust feeders and drinkers to ensure availability of feed and correct flow rate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and/or adjust feeders and drinkers to ensure availability of feed and correct flow rate.

pcs.text: Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Resolve and/or report issues according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Resolve and/or report issues according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Resolve and/or report issues according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare farrowing environment

elements.title: Monitor pre-farrowing sows

pcs.text: Monitor general health and welfare of pre-farrowing sows
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor general health and welfare of pre-farrowing sows?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor general health and welfare of pre-farrowing sows.

pcs.text: Move and acclimatise sows and gilts to new environment as required, using safe manual handling techniques and low stress animal handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move and acclimatise sows and gilts to new environment as required, using safe manual handling techniques and low stress animal handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move and acclimatise sows and gilts to new environment as required, using safe manual handling techniques and low stress animal handling techniques.

pcs.text: Adjust feeding regime for pre-farrowing sows as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust feeding regime for pre-farrowing sows as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust feeding regime for pre-farrowing sows as required.

pcs.text: Check sow records and confirm anticipated due date where possible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check sow records and confirm anticipated due date where possible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check sow records and confirm anticipated due date where possible.

pcs.text: Identify sows showing signs of farrowing, and adjust environment accordingly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sows showing signs of farrowing, and adjust environment accordingly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sows showing signs of farrowing, and adjust environment accordingly.

pcs.text: Identify, resolve and report issues to supervisor, including overdue sows
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, resolve and report issues to supervisor, including overdue sows?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, resolve and report issues to supervisor, including overdue sows.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Monitor pre-farrowing sows

elements.title: Care for farrowing sows

pcs.text: Select, check and prepare farrowing equipment and resources required to assist sows
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and prepare farrowing equipment and resources required to assist sows?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare farrowing equipment and resources required to assist sows.

pcs.text: Monitor sows for signs of distress and/or discomfort
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor sows for signs of distress and/or discomfort?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor sows for signs of distress and/or discomfort.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to assisting sows during farrowing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to assisting sows during farrowing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to assisting sows during farrowing.

pcs.text: Select and fit PPE according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit PPE according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit PPE according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Identify sows experiencing farrowing difficulties, and assist sows according to enterprise safety and animal welfare procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sows experiencing farrowing difficulties, and assist sows according to enterprise safety and animal welfare procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sows experiencing farrowing difficulties, and assist sows according to enterprise safety and animal welfare procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report farrowing data and/or issues as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report farrowing data and/or issues as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report farrowing data and/or issues as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Care for farrowing sows

elements.title: Care for lactating sows

pcs.text: Monitor sows for signs of lactation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor sows for signs of lactation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor sows for signs of lactation.

pcs.text: Adjust feeding regime to suit sow nutritional requirements throughout lactation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust feeding regime to suit sow nutritional requirements throughout lactation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust feeding regime to suit sow nutritional requirements throughout lactation.

pcs.text: Identify signs of ill health and/or discomfort in sows and piglets, and take appropriate action according to Farm Treatment Plan and welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify signs of ill health and/or discomfort in sows and piglets, and take appropriate action according to Farm Treatment Plan and welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify signs of ill health and/or discomfort in sows and piglets, and take appropriate action according to Farm Treatment Plan and welfare requirements.

pcs.text: Maintain clean pig environment and dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain clean pig environment and dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain clean pig environment and dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental requirements.

pcs.text: Foster piglets according to sow capacity and enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Foster piglets according to sow capacity and enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Foster piglets according to sow capacity and enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report husbandry data and/or issues as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report husbandry data and/or issues as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report husbandry data and/or issues as required.

elements.title: Wean sows

pcs.text: Confirm sows to be weaned according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm sows to be weaned according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm sows to be weaned according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and move piglets to be weaned

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and move piglets to be weaned.

pcs.text: Record weaning data according to enterprise procedures5.4 Complete sow husbandry and health procedures according to Farm Treatment Plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record weaning data according to enterprise procedures5.4 Complete sow husbandry and health procedures according to Farm Treatment Plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record weaning data according to enterprise procedures5.4 Complete sow husbandry and health procedures according to Farm Treatment Plan.

pcs.text: Relocate sows according to production program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Relocate sows according to production program.
